text: He put a turkey into the oven to cook for Thanksgiving dinner.
sentence_2: He put a turkey into the washing machine to cook for Thanksgiving dinner.

text: She wore sunglasses to protect her eyes from the bright sunshine.
sentence_2: She wore sunglasses to protect her ears from the bright sunshine.

text: The students used pencils to write their answers on the exam paper.
sentence_2: The students used bananas to write their answers on the exam paper.

text: He drank a glass of water because he was very thirsty after the run.
sentence_2: He drank a glass of lava because he was very thirsty after the run.

text: The baby cried when she was hungry and wanted to be fed.
sentence_2: The rock cried when it was hungry and wanted to be fed.

text: She took an umbrella because the forecast predicted rain this afternoon.
sentence_2: She took an umbrella because the forecast predicted sunshine this afternoon.

text: He rode his bicycle to school along the designated bike path.
sentence_2: He rode his bicycle to school along the bottom of the ocean.

text: The farmer planted seeds in the soil and watered them regularly.
sentence_2: The farmer planted seeds in the concrete and watered them regularly.

text: She used a key to unlock the front door of her apartment.
sentence_2: She used a feather to unlock the front door of her apartment.

text: The mechanic used a wrench to tighten the bolts on the engine.
sentence_2: The mechanic used a pillow to tighten the bolts on the engine.
